title: otostegia limbata
intro: Otostegia limbata, also known as Desert Lambs Ear or Western Desert Lambs Ear, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal remedies and supplements to support overall health and well-being.
